records.ety: [F. cavalcade, fr. It. cavalcata, fr. cavalcare to go on horseback, fr. LL. caballicare, fr. L. caballus an inferior horse, Gr. <?/. Cf. Cavalier, Cavalry.]

defs: A procession of persons on horseback; a formal, pompous march of horsemen by way of parade.
quotes: He brought back war-worn cavalcade to the city.
